data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. DIFFERENT GRAVY finished 12th of 16 when resuming last start over 1600m in the Vobis Platinum Guineas at Caulfield. He won second-up last prep and jumping from an inside draw has winning claims. 5. MCWOODY after having made a poor beginning settled well back in the running then came home strongly from fifth of seven into the turn to score over 1600m at Sandown Lakeside. He drops 3kg in weight and is a leading chance. 4. MATAHGA fought on well to finish last of four last time out over 1600m at this track when well supported. Rates well as a strong each-way chance. 2. BOOTLEGGER finished a last start third of four over 1600m at this track after leading into the turn as the odds-on favourite. Can atone.","runners":[1,5,4,2],"exclusive":true}
